steps.title: Translate the percent statements
steps.content:
Convert each percent into a multiplier:
$$b=0.82c$$
$$a=21.32(b+c)$$
The percent $2{,}132\%$ becomes $21.32$ because it is divided by $100$.

steps.title: Write the sum using one variable
steps.content:
Use $b=0.82c$ in the expression $b+c$:
$$b+c=0.82c+c=1.82c$$
Then substitute into the equation for $a$:
$$a=21.32(1.82c)=38.8024c$$

steps.title: Convert the ratio to a percent
steps.content: Compare $a$ to $b$: $$\frac{a}{b}=\frac{38.8024c}{0.82c}=47.32$$ So $a$ is $$47.32(100\%)=4{,}732\%$$ of $b$. The answer is A.
